slideshows.hook: Study smarter until you're the smartest in the room 🧠📚

slides.headline: Study smarter until you're the smartest in the room 🧠📚
Tip #1
slides.subline: Talk to yourself out loud until you sound crazy. Narrate what you're doing in English while you cook, clean, rest, etc..

slides.headline: Use SHORTCT
slides.subline: Voice notes, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps & Feynman feedback in one study app

slides.headline: Tip #2
slides.subline: Don't just memorize. Use the Feynman Technique: explain it like you're teaching a 5 year old. If you can't explain it simply, you don't get it yet.

slides.headline: Tip #3
slides.subline: Stop cramming the night before. Space your study sessions out. Review a little every day instead of everything at once.

slides.headline: Tip #4
slides.subline: Make a study plan and actually stick to it. No plan = no structure = panic mode before every exam.
